plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a 'page.ai' execution in DETERMINISTIC mode because the cached instructions attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that is not present on the current page. The failure screenshot shows a version of the form labeled 'Set 2' which contains a 'Your Name' field instead.
observedIndicators: Deterministic mode (cache) was active during failure
Selector resolution failed for 'Last Name' field which is visually absent in failure screenshot
UI indicates a dynamic state ('Set 2') suggesting A/B testing or rotating form layouts
Historical flow history shows an alternating SUCCESS/FAILED pattern, suggesting frequent UI variations

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry automation.
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Donobu AI cache and retry the test. This will force the agent to perform a fresh autonomous crawl of the 'Set 2' form instead of relying on the stale 'Last Name' selectors.

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate the need for non-deterministic execution if UI instability is expected.
remediationSteps.details: If the application frequently rotates between different form layouts ('Set 1', 'Set 2', etc.), consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific test or ensuring the AI objective remains highly generalized.

plan.notes: Visual evidence confirms the UI has changed (labeled 'Set 2' in the screenshot), while the tool parameters show the automation was looking for 'Last Name'. Since the overall objective is semantically flexible ('Fill out all survey questions'), clearing the cache will allow the AI to re-analyze the new form structure and proceed.
